objective: Add a scoped Lean declaration for: letting ℓ(N) be the largest k such that every finite A ⊆ ℝ with |A| = N has a Sidon subset S ⊆ A of size k, conjecturally ℓ(N) ~ √N. The contribution is the precise formal statement and supporting definitions, not a claimed proof.
completion_criteria: A self-contained Lean file defining the Sidon predicate and extremal function, with the conjecture declaration typechecked by Lean’s kernel; CI and an independent local `lake build` reproduce the check.
non_results: Finite computation outside its stated range is not a proof of a universal claim.
A candidate is not a solution until independent and human review are recorded.
Restating a known reduction, checking examples, or giving an unproved key lemma is not terminal success.

baseline_review.requirement: Repeat when the authoritative status changes materially or the baseline is explicitly invalidated.

synthesis_summary: The bounded audit confirmed that PR 4044 remains an active same-target formalization with no coordination signal. No Lean source was changed. The existing local target-build receipt was reviewed and validated for its exact kernel-checking claim, but the formalization is not an independently novel or accepted contribution.

strategies.title: Mandatory source/literature baseline followed by a scoped Lean interface draft and bounded independent semantic controls
strategies.mechanism: Translate the maintained min-max statement using Finset, Nat.findGreatest, and Mathlib asymptotic equivalence; test the Sidon semantics independently before repository-pinned elaboration.
strategies.hypothesis: The proposed four-variable Sidon predicate represents uniqueness of unordered pair sums with repetition, and the resulting bounded extremal interface can express the explicit conjecture ell(N) ~ sqrt(N).
strategies.discriminating_test: Compare the four-variable predicate with an independently implemented unordered-pair-sum encoding on every subset of {-4,...,4}, then attempt Lean elaboration far enough to identify whether the local environment contains the required repository dependencies.
strategies.blocker: The current workspace has Lean 4.32.0 but no Formal Conjectures or Mathlib checkout, shell network access cannot resolve GitHub, and the target repository pins Lean 4.27.0 with Mathlib commit a3a10db0e9d66acbebf76c5e6a135066525ac900. No kernel build or external review is therefore available.
strategies.reopen_condition: A network-enabled or prepopulated current Formal Conjectures checkout at the pinned dependency versions, followed by target and full builds.

strategies.title: Reviewed the completed hash-bound Lean target lab, then performed a reproducible matched prior-art audit against the official problem, Formal Conjectures issue 773, and open PR 4044.
strategies.mechanism: Use the pinned Lean kernel to validate exact source hashes, independently audit Sidon semantics, and fail closed when a live primary-source search reveals overlapping upstream work.
strategies.hypothesis: The repaired source kernel-checks on current pinned main, but it cannot qualify as a novel independent formalization if live upstream records contain a same-target reviewed pull request.
strategies.discriminating_test: Validate the completed warning-fatal target receipt and query the official page plus GitHub issue, pull-request, comment, and review APIs for a same-target active contribution.
strategies.blocker: A same-target reviewed upstream PR already exists; proceeding requires human coordination or explicit maintainer authorization, followed by helper placement, clean-checkout build, full CI, and acceptance.
strategies.reopen_condition: Documented coordination with PR 4044's author or Formal Conjectures maintainers, or explicit approval for a replacement after PR 4044 is closed or abandoned.

strategies.title: Independently reran the bounded live-status audit for the existing same-target Formal Conjectures pull request and reviewed the completed hash-bound Lean build receipt.
strategies.mechanism: Compare fixed primary-source and repository API fields against the prior snapshot, permitting source work only after an explicit coordination event.
strategies.hypothesis: As of 2026-07-22, PR 4044 remains open at head e9caf02a19d55dff055d89d441b45272e1fa134b with awaiting-author and no API-visible event authorizing an independent replacement.
strategies.discriminating_test: Run checks/audit_erdos530_live_status.sh through the deterministic experiment wrapper and compare problem status, issue state, PR state, merge state, head SHA, labels, update time, comments, and reviews.
strategies.blocker: No documented permission exists to modify, supersede, or independently resubmit the active same-target PR.
strategies.reopen_condition: Documented consent from PR 4044's author or maintainers, or PR closure/abandonment followed by explicit maintainer approval for a replacement.

failure_signatures.signature: Importing the previously built target OLean locally exposed a stale mounted-cache path; a second isolated attempt used unavailable repository-specific attributes. Neither failure reached the equivalence theorem.
When migrating between extensionally equivalent predicates, positional argument order can change even when the surface equality and theorem meaning do not.
A technically valid formalization selected from stale repository-status metadata can duplicate an active contribution.
Stable awaiting-author PR with unchanged head and no documented authorization makes further independent source work duplicative.

constraints_learned.constraint: The original finite-set predicate and project IsSidon are extensionally equivalent.
constraints_learned.scope: Every finite set of real numbers.

constraints_learned.constraint: Repeated summands must be included and swapped representations must be trivial.
constraints_learned.scope: The sourced Sidon convention for Problem #530.

constraints_learned.constraint: An exact target may still have an 8038-job dependency closure.
constraints_learned.scope: The pinned Formal Conjectures checkout and prior target run.

constraints_learned.constraint: Project IsSidon arguments are ordered i₁,j₁,i₂,j₂ while the sum is i₁+i₂=j₁+j₂.
Definitions and proved results needed to state a conjecture must be placed in a separate indexed FormalConjecturesForMathlib file.
Do not redefine IsSidon; cast the Finset to Set and reuse the project predicate.
constraints_learned.evidence: Maintainer review comment 3312344627 and the locally checked API refactor.

constraints_learned.constraint: Do not open a competing independent PR while PR 4044 remains active without coordination.
constraints_learned.evidence: PR 4044 is open, reviewed, unmerged, and labelled awaiting-author.

constraints_learned.constraint: An awaiting-author label and inactivity do not constitute abandonment or permission to replace the active PR.
constraints_learned.evidence: PR 4044 remains open and unmerged with an identified author.

constraints_learned.constraint: REST review-comment enumeration cannot establish review-thread resolution state.
constraints_learned.scope: This audit's eight enumerated inline comments.
constraints_learned.evidence: The audit queried REST pull-request comments and reviews only.

decision_history.prediction: The legacy finite predicate and repository predicate would agree, permitting API reuse without changing the mathematical statement.
decision_history.observation: Lean accepted the universal equivalence theorem and both edge controls with return code 0 and empty diagnostics.
decision_history.surprise: The mathematical semantics agreed, but the candidate unnecessarily duplicated an API already used by other Formal Conjectures files. The delegate's claimed elimination of 8037 build targets was also contradicted by the 8038-job target log.
decision_history.next_discriminator: Inspect the completed record for lab-scout-bdf77f43574b-03d1a8ffc4cf and accept or reject the refactored source at its first warning or elaboration result.

decision_history.prediction: The failed target would expose a local control-test defect rather than a defect in the extremal declaration.
decision_history.observation: The failed build reported one unsolved goal at line 102. The pinned definition confirmed the wrong ordering, and the candidate was repaired to match the already-correct independent audit. A new local audit retry timed out after 120.135 seconds with empty diagnostics.
decision_history.surprise: The unchanged audit, previously completed in 10.082 seconds, exceeded 120 seconds in this environment; this is a resource/cold-cache result rather than semantic evidence.
decision_history.next_discriminator: Inspect lab-scout-bdf77f43574b-135f90912547 and validate or redirect at its first diagnostic.

decision_history.prediction: The repaired local source would pass the exact target and could then advance to helper relocation.
decision_history.observation: The source passed warning-fatally with a nonempty OLean, but a live audit found same-target open PR 4044 and invalidated the no-PR novelty premise.
decision_history.surprise: The injected baseline and Terra memo said there was no branch or PR, although PR 4044 had existed since 2026-05-26 and had maintainer review.
decision_history.next_discriminator: Run checks/audit_erdos530_live_status.sh read-only; resume edits only after documented coordination or explicit maintainer authorization.

decision_history.prediction: The same-target PR would remain active with no coordination signal.
decision_history.observation: PR 4044 remained open, non-draft, unmerged, at head e9caf02a19d55dff055d89d441b45272e1fa134b, labelled awaiting-author, and last updated 2026-05-27T17:08:45Z.
decision_history.surprise: None; the independently generated normalized output matched the delegate-reported SHA-256 exactly.
decision_history.next_discriminator: Repeat the fixed status audit once in the next epoch; proceed only if documented coordination or an explicitly approved replacement path appears.

prior_art_decisions.exact_delta: The project already had the correct Sidon predicate, but no Problem 530 extremal function or asymptotic declaration. This epoch removed the redundant local predicate while retaining new scoped GuaranteedSidonSize, ell, bounded-maximality API, and the sourced asymptotic question.
prior_art_decisions.duplicate_risk: A local IsSidon definition would merely duplicate the existing reusable API; the remaining risk is that helper placement or an unlinked external formalization has been missed.
prior_art_decisions.comparison_test: Prove the local predicate iff the existing API in Lean and verify issue #773 has no branch or pull request.

prior_art_decisions.exact_delta: The candidate provides the missing extremal-function and asymptotic interface for Problem 530 while reusing the repository's existing IsSidon predicate instead of duplicating it.
prior_art_decisions.duplicate_risk: An unlinked private branch could independently formalize issue #773; no public assigned issue, linked PR, or known formalization is currently recorded.
prior_art_decisions.comparison_test: Recheck issue #773 assignment/linked development and repository code search before promotion or external submission.

prior_art_decisions.exact_delta: Both versions define the universal Sidon-subset extremum with Nat.findGreatest and state ell(N) ~ sqrt(N). The local version reuses project IsSidon, deletes the extra solved-order and cover conjectures, adds proved extremal API, and has a current-main warning-fatal kernel receipt.
prior_art_decisions.duplicate_risk: Submitting the local file independently could duplicate an active reviewed contribution and compete with its author.
prior_art_decisions.comparison_test: Compare definitions, theorem scope, and maintainer comments at PR head e9caf02a19d55dff055d89d441b45272e1fa134b against local source hash 3ff7038c3c08f48408f48d53c4503182944cfd8c51b549cbab570a3b062e8466.

prior_art_decisions.exact_delta: The local file reuses repository IsSidon, narrows the declarations to the scoped target, and has a current-main kernel receipt; PR 4044 already contains the same extremal-function and asymptotic mechanism.
prior_art_decisions.duplicate_risk: An independent submission would duplicate an open, reviewed, same-target pull request.
prior_art_decisions.comparison_test: Compare PR 4044's state, head, labels, declaration mechanism, and maintainer review against the local source and prior snapshot.
